---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A one-line description of what you'd like.

## Problem

What problem does this solve? What's the current workaround?

## Proposed Solution

How should this work? Include example commands or UI if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've thought about.

## Category

- [ ] New scanner (app/tool to detect)
- [ ] New command
- [ ] HTML report improvement
- [ ] Safety/security enhancement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Additional Context

Any relevant details: macOS paths, app names, typical sizes, etc.
